title: Flan Shop
description: Buy Flan Claimblocks using just your hotbar and offhand!
body:
Don't like using commands and config files?

This is a support datapack/mod for the [Flan mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/flan) allowing you to buy Claimblocks using just your hotbar and offhand.


## How do I buy Claimblocks?
While holding a golden hoe, the shop instructions are visible in the action bar.

Now also holding the item you want to sell in your offhand gives you the next prompt;

Holding **Sneak** will sell all items of that type in your inventory over time.

Thus, watch your inventory, if you don't want to sell everything at once!

## What items can I sell for how many Claimblocks?
Gold Ingot - 2 Claimblocks

Emerald - 4 Claimblocks

Gold Block - 18 Claimblocks

Emerald Block - 36 Claimblocks

## Installing as Datapack
As with any datapack, use **/reload** after placing **flanshop.zip** in the datapacks folder of your server to activate it.

## Uninstalling
Using **/function flanshop:uninstall** will uninstall the datapack. 

Remove **flanshop.zip** from the **datapacks** folder before using **/reload** to keep it uninstalled.

## Feedback
Feel free to give me bug reports, feature ideas or other feedback on my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/u9SRbexPwk).
